site.title: Mountain Soul Foundation — Modern Mind, Ancient Roots

hero.subline: Education that heals. Culture that empowers. Development that sustains. A registered NGO born during COVID-19, reviving Devbhoomi Uttarakhand through experiential learning, women's empowerment, and cultural preservation.

programs.body: Bridging modern education with ancient wisdom — making villages living classrooms and women the real knowledge holders of Devbhoomi Uttarakhand.

cards.title: Modern Mind, Ancient Roots
cards.desc: Our flagship experiential learning program takes school students to villages where they learn Biology, Chemistry, Physics and Social Science through traditional practices — aligned with NEP 2020 and Indian Knowledge Systems (IKS).

cards.title: Women & SHG Empowerment
cards.desc: Village women of Saura Sari SHG are educators and leaders — teaching seed preservation, pickle making, leaf-plate (pattal) manufacturing, and rope making. Their knowledge earns dignity and income.

cards.title: Sports & Life Discipline
cards.desc: In partnership with MP Sports College, Dehradun — students experience football grounds, hockey fields, athletic tracks, shooting ranges, and Asia's first ice skating rink to build character, discipline, and resilience.

cards.title: Sustainability & Culture
cards.desc: 100+ trees planted across 9 villages, Ganga Swachhata Abhiyan, Giloy Kadha distribution during COVID, and campaigns preserving Uttarakhand's festivals, food traditions, and indigenous knowledge systems.

approach.body: Learning by doing — an ancient and global philosophy. Every village is a unique education centre with teachers who have never been given a classroom.

steps.title: Village as Classroom
steps.desc: Students are taken to real villages where farmers, women SHGs and elders become the teachers — reversing the traditional knowledge hierarchy.

steps.title: Kishan Ki Pathsala
steps.desc: Farmers teach full crop cycles, traditional irrigation (Gharat, Panchakki), soil health, natural fertilizers and weather reading — ancient science made alive.

steps.title: Culture Through Living
steps.desc: Students taste Jhangora and Mandua, wear traditional dress, witness rope-making and pattal crafts — culture is not taught as nostalgia, it is lived.

steps.title: The Gift of Dignity
steps.desc: Each student receives a Gift Pack made by SHG women — pickles, handicrafts and leaf plates — creating market linkage between village producers and urban consumers.

gallery.section_tag: Modern Mind, Ancient Roots — In the Field

about.body: Mountain Soul Foundation was born during COVID-19 in 2021. Manoj Prakash Jaguri, a native of Uttarkashi, inspired by his mother's resilience and the mountains' ancient wisdom, began distributing Giloy Kadha village to village. That act of care became a movement — and a registered NGO by October 2021.
about.quote: "The soul of the mountains can only be protected by empowering the people who live there."
list: Founded 2021 — born during COVID-19, registered NGO October 2021
Active across Garhwal & Kumaon regions of Uttarakhand
Aligned with NEP 2020 and Indian Knowledge Systems (IKS)
Partner: MP Sports College Dehradun, Bright Public Junior High School
Programs: Education · Women Empowerment · Sports · Sustainability · Culture

quote_banner.text_plain: "Mountain Soul Foundation is not an organization that started with resources.

contact.body: Partner with us to bring experiential learning to schools, support SHG women, and help preserve the living culture of Uttarakhand.
